titleStmt.title: SII 18.61: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 61. (B.K. No. 27 of 1934-35.) HOḶIĀNAVĒRI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab near the Rāmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription, the beginning of which is broken away and lost, is dated in Śaka 970, Sarvadhāri, Pushya ba. Bidige, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrāṁti, corresponding to A.D. 1048, December 25, Sunday. The Saṁkrānti occurred on Saturday the 24th.

It records the grant of the village Ānevari to the holy place Rāmatirtha in Raṭṭapaḷḷi Seventy. The gift was entrusted to [Dha]vaḷa Gōṇiyadēva, the disciple of Āneyadēva. The names of this donee and his teacher (guru) appear to have been engraved later on, after erasing the original ones.

It also records a grant of land to some women, to musicians and dancing girls in the service of the temple, to the free students hostel (Vidyā-chhatra) to a certain Māchimayya of Brahmapuri and for worship and offerings in the temple.

The gift was made by Chāmuṇḍarāyarasa and Kētarasa. The latter was governing Raṭṭapaḷḷi Seventy and Iṭṭage Thirty. One Chāmuṇḍarāya who was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand is known to have been a subordinate of Sōmēśvara I. It is probable that he is the same as the Chāmuṇḍarāya of this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
manōjaṁ guṇapūrṇnamēru pāpakke bhīru Arithaṭṭabhairava nāmāthi samastapraśasti
sahitaṁ śrīmatkētarasar raṭṭapaḷḷi 70 ma Iṭṭage 30 maṁtribhōgābhyaṁtara siddhiyiṁ dāḷuttamire śrī manmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāmuṇḍarāyarasaruṁ kētarasanumiḻdu sakavarṣa 970 neya sarbbadhāri saṁvatsarada pauṣya bahu
ḷa bidige Ādityavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu . yamaniyama svādhyāyadhyāna dhāraṇamōnānu
ṣṭāṇaparāyaṇa ṣaḍaṁgōpahārādisaṁmpannarappa śrīmat Āneyadēvare śiṣyaru
sivana dāsi dhavaḷagōṇiyadēvargge kālaṁ kacci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mmāḍi sarvva bādhāparihāraṁ sarvvanamasyamāgeThe letters in the brackets are engraved after erasing the original ones.
raṭṭapaḷḷi 70ṟa baḷiya kūḍalasaṁgamada rāmatīrtthakke Ānevariyaṁ koṭṭaralli sēna bōva Āytavarmma
yyana sose piriyara caṭṭabbege mattaraydu peggaḍevāḷa kāmalatege mattaru nālku Aṁkada bādiya magaḷ
modala cāmaraṁ kaṁbada sūḷe kāḷabbege mattaraydu . kaḷama 1 nannabbege mattaru nālku [Eṟeyabbe] ge mattaruThe letters in bracketsThe letters kaḷama 1 are written below the line.
nālku dēvalabjege mattaru mūṟu paṟekāṟaṁge mattareṁṭu vaṁsigaṁge mattarnnālku chātrakke maThe letters in brackets are
ttarnnālku sūḷevāḷage mattamūṟu brahmapuriya mācimayyaṁge mattarppanneraḍu gaḻde keṟeThe letters in brackets
ya keḷage kammamayvattu tōṁṭa mattaroṁdu mādhavayyaṁge mattarppanneraḍu gaḻda kammamayvattu tōṭaṁ mattaroṁ
du vidyācchatrakke mattarirppatteṁṭu Alli viśēṣaṁ dēvargge śrīkhaṇḍa dūpa dīpa nivēdya khaṇḍasphuṭita jīrṇnō
ddhārakkaṁ Idu naiṣṭhika sthāna brahmacaryyavilladavaraṁ kētarasanuṁ dēhutaruṁ pādamūlaparivāramiḻdu
kaḷeyaloḍeyarī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidōṁge kurukṣētraṁ prayāge bāṇarāsi Argghya tīrtthagaḷoḷu sā
sira kavileyubhayamukhiyaṁ brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phalavakkuṁ Idanaḻidātaṁ Ā puṇyatīrtthadoḷsāsira
kavileyanaḻida pañcamahāpātakanakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasa
haśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhava
dbhiḥ sarbbānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra . mama vaṁśaparikṣī
ṇē yaḥ kaścinṛpatirbhbhavēttēṣāhaṁ pādalagnōpi mayā dattaṁ na lōpayōt . Ī sāsanamaṁ kaṇdarisidaṁ
kalkuṭiga mācōjaṁge keymattarmmūṟu Allige takka besanaṁ māḍuguṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī ©
Digital edition of SII 18.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
